description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and code_quality. Add a build job named build that runs in the build stage using the maven:3.6.0-jdk-8-alpine image, executes "mvn clean install -B -DskipTests", and caches the .m2/ directory. Add a test job named test that runs in the test stage with the same Maven image and executes "mvn clean install -B". Add a code_quality job named code_quality that runs in the code_quality stage using the docker:stable image and docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, exports SP_VERSION from CI_SERVER_VERSION, and runs a Docker container "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/codequality:$SP_VERSION" with the source code mounted, allowing failure and publishing the gl-code-quality-report.json artifact. Add a sast job named sast that also runs in the code_quality stage with docker:stable image and docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER, exports SP_VERSION, runs the Docker image "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/sast:$SP_VERSION" with SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL environment variable and executes "/app/bin/run /code", allowing failure and publishing the gl-sast-report.json artifact. No explicit rules or only/except conditions are defined.
